message:
test: pin libgen.h + utimensat/futimens conformance via differential harness

Adds two harnesses:
- conformance_diff_libgen.rs: 2 functions (basename, dirname) across
  18 path cases. Compares against POSIX __xpg_basename symbol (not
  GNU basename). 6 tests; documents POSIX-implementation-defined
  dirname("//") edge as DISC-LIBGEN-001.
- conformance_diff_utimensat.rs: 2 functions (utimensat, futimens).
  Sets known timestamps, stat()s back, compares with UTIME_OMIT and
  ENOENT edges. 5 tests, 0 divergences.

Beads: bd-lbgn1, bd-utns1
